messages.text: Write me a poem about loving iPhone and Mac

messages.title: Ode to iPhone and Mac
messages.text:
Beneath my touch, the glass does gleam,
A portal to a modern dream.
The iPhone hums, so sleek, refined,
A loyal friend, a clever mind.

Its polished frame, a work of art,
A piece of tech that warms the heart.
From morning calls to twilight scrolls,
It keeps me whole, it makes me whole.

And then the Mac, a silver stage,
Where thoughts take flight and words engage.
Its keys, a symphony of sound,
Ideas born with every pound.

The screen, a canvas crystal-clear,
Where visions bloom and tasks appear.
From coding lines to edits fine,
Its elegance is purely divine.
